mapper.sql: id, place_name, place_address, site_href, comment_num, latitude, longitude, place_source, place_score, place_type, update_time, key_word
mapper.insert:
insert into place_info
id,
place_name,
place_address,
site_href,
comment_num,
latitude,
longitude,
place_source,
place_score,
place_type,
update_time,
key_word,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{placeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{placeAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{siteHref,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{commentNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{latitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{longitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{placeSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{placeScore,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{placeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{keyWord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update place_info
place_name = #{placeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
place_address = #{placeAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
site_href = #{siteHref,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
comment_num = #{commentNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
latitude = #{latitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
longitude = #{longitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
place_source = #{placeSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
place_score = #{placeScore,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
place_type = #{placeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
key_word = #{keyWord,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update place_info set place_name = #{placeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, place_address = #{placeAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, site_href = #{siteHref,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comment_num = #{commentNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, latitude = #{latitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, longitude = #{longitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, place_source = #{placeSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, place_score = #{placeScore,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, place_type = #{placeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, key_word = #{keyWord,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert:
insert into place_info (id,place_name, place_address, site_href, comment_num, latitude, longitude, place_source, place_score, place_type,update_time,key_word) values
( #{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.placeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.placeAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.siteHref,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.commentNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.latitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.longitude,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.placeSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.placeScore,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.placeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate(), #{item.keyWord,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
on duplicate key update site_href = values(site_href), place_score = values(place_score), update_time = sysdate(), key_word = values(key_word)
